summary: You think you know who Lucifer is. Red skin, horns, a trident—but the Bible tells a completely different story. In this video, we discover together the true face of Lucifer that has been misrepresented for 1,600 years. 📖 Topics covered in this video: ✦ Why the name "Lucifer" appears only once in the Bible ✦ The original Hebrew "Helel (הֵילֵל)" — The true meaning of the Shining One ✦ Lucifer's true nature as described in Ezekiel 28 ✦ Lucifer's 5 "I"s — The real reason for his fall ✦ The shocking truth in Job 1 about where Satan is now ✦ Satan's strategy of disguising himself as an angel of light (2 Corinthians 11:14) ✦ Lucifer and Jesus — The one who ascended and the one who descended 📜 Bible
